title: Andy Blitzer | Chief Procurement Officer | BAL Immigration Law
content:
## Chief Procurement Officer // New York
“It’s exciting to be part of a firm that constantly strives to deliver exceptional, innovative service to its clients.”
Andy is the Chief Procurement Officer in BAL’s New York office. He brings more than 20 years of experience specializing in sourcing global goods and services, leading complex negotiations and implementing cost-saving strategies. Andy always seeks innovative terms and solutions, collaborating with his peers to deliver optimal results that benefit the firm and its employees. A member of the Association of Certified Fraud Examiners and Ordre des Comptables Professionnels Agréés, Andy is recognized for his expertise in the field. He has authored training programs on fraud detection, negotiation skills and financial reporting and his career has spanned corporate and government roles. Beyond work, Andy and his wife founded the nonprofit "flour4purpose," a baking establishment producing “pure” natural sweets with a focus on creating job opportunities for individuals with different abilities.
MIT Sloan School of Management, Executive Certificate in Strategy and Innovation McGill University, CPA, Public Accounting McGill University, B.S., Commerce
